description: Tony Parker discusses his philanthropic efforts through his foundation and the integration of NFTs in charity work. He emphasizes the importance of giving back to the community and supporting athletes in need. Parker shares insights on his long-standing charity gala and his approach to using Web3 technology for transparency in charitable contributions.
topic_summary: Tony Parker explores the intersection of art, charity, and Web3 technology, highlighting his foundation's initiatives and the potential of NFTs to impact the sports community positively. He reflects on his experiences in philanthropy and the evolution of his charity gala over the years.
